name: dunemap
author: FireDervil
description: Interactive Dune: Awakening map with automatic Coriolis Storm Timer based on official Discord bot data

2.0.1: 🌟 Standard-Marker für A1-A9 Sektoren: Automatisch vorbefüllte Marker beim Plugin-Aktivierung
🗺️ Permanente Marker für Deep Desert-Sektoren (überstehen Storm-Resets)
⚡ Automatisches Seeding beim onGuildEnable für neue Installationen
2.0.0: 🌪️ Automatic Coriolis Storm Timer based on server region selection
🌍 Full support for 5 official regions: EU, NA, SA, AS, OCE
⚙️ Simplified settings interface (removed 4 redundant configuration fields)
🔄 Storm timer now counts to reset time (end of storm) matching official websites
📊 Integration with official Dune: Awakening Discord bot timing data
✨ Live countdown display with 1-second updates in Dashboard
🚀 Bot command /storm shows automatic timer based on guild region
📍 Region flags and localized time display
1.0.0: Initial release with manual storm timer configuration
Interactive sector map with marker system
Discord channel integration for map updates
